vide

Writes a debug value to standard output.

Syntax: vide

Category

output

Related

  • scribe
  • mone

Examples

examples/corpus/vide/vide.fab (canonical · keyword)

Writes a debug value to standard output.

# vide diagnostic output
#
# vide <expr>  -- emit a vide-style inspection diagnostic (distinct from nota/mone)
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   outputStmt :← 'vide' expr
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   vide-style diagnostic: "inspecta"

incipit {
    vide "inspecta"
}

Expected output:

inspecta
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/vide/vide.fab"]
